text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 
8 
AMI_EVER 
LABEL: 
Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the AMI indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) acute myocardial infarction (AMI; heart attack) indicator. The variable will be blank 
for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 
SHORT
